title: Migrate Weltgewebe hashing safely to sha2 0.11 for PR #1411
goal: Adapt Weltgewebe hash finalization and hexadecimal encoding to sha2 0.11 while preserving byte-for-byte hash meaning, authentication behavior and persistence contracts.

acceptance.assertion: All migrated digest-to-hex call sites produce the same lowercase hexadecimal bytes as sha2 0.10 for fixed test vectors.
acceptance.verifier: new cross-version or golden-vector unit tests

acceptance.assertion: Every failing hash finalization site in auth routes, passkeys, step-up tokens and tokens is migrated through one reviewed, consistent encoding path.
acceptance.verifier: code search and focused unit tests

acceptance.assertion: Authentication, session persistence, passkey, magic-link and database proof jobs pass on the exact final head.
cargo fmt, clippy with warnings denied and the full Rust test suite pass.
A full final GitHub diff and SHA-256-bound self-review are recorded before merge.

metadata.observed_failure: sha2 0.11 digest output no longer implements LowerHex; format!("{:x}", hasher.finalize()) fails at seven authentication-related call sites.
